metadata.description: Framework + Agent Skills for a headless AI assisting system over real folders — an in-folder knowledge wiki, plus the development process that builds it. Shared across Claude Code / Cowork sessions and any automated pipeline.

plugins.name: ai-os-skills
plugins.description: Agent Skills for the AI-OS framework: the knowledge layer (project-onboarding, wiki-onboarding, wiki-maintenance, user-onboarding) and the development-process trio (agent-tiered-planning, design-direction-lock, adversarial-review).
